message:
fix(beads): Add missing dependency links in epic subtask chains

Fixed 7 missing dependencies found during deep analysis:
- Examples: 5o9 (tests) now depends on 50z (advanced examples)
- Benchmarks: gbj (Go comparison) now depends on 54e and 7w1
- Async: 6kg (unit tests) now depends on e7e (graceful shutdown)
- Derive: y3n (unit tests) now depends on 9e9 and 31d
- Theme: 481 (unit tests) now depends on od6 (presets)

These fixes ensure:
- Tests run only after all testable features are implemented
- Go comparison benchmarks include ALL crate benchmarks
- No implementation tasks are "terminal nodes" without downstream blockers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
